symptom: a fall onto a steel rod at a construction site
hook: a long steel rod had passed straight through the chest
whatYouSee: A long steel rod passing straight through the chest.
whyItMatters: An impaling rod is left in place until surgery because pulling it out can cause fatal bleeding.
treatment: It is removed in the operating room with the chest opened to control bleeding.
takeaway: A long metal rod crossing the chest is an impalement injury.

generated.threadsCaption:
A patient came in with a fall onto a steel rod at a construction site.

Then the X-ray loaded 😭

And a long steel rod had passed straight through the chest.

Quick diagnosis challenge 🩻

What's the most likely diagnosis?

Wild guesses are welcome 👀
generated.threadsAnswer:
Answer: Impalement by a metal rod

👀 What you see:
A long steel rod passing straight through the chest.

🦴 Why it matters:
An impaling rod is left in place until surgery because pulling it out can cause fatal bleeding.

💊 Treatment:
It is removed in the operating room with the chest opened to control bleeding.
